mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, chain, token, tx_hash, from_address, to_address, amount, block_number, confirmations, required_confirms, status, detected_at, confirmed_at, updated_at FROM t_wallet_deposit_tx WHERE chain = #{chain} AND tx_hash = #{txHash}

SELECT id, user_id, chain, token, tx_hash, from_address, to_address, amount, block_number, confirmations, required_confirms, status, detected_at, confirmed_at, updated_at FROM t_wallet_deposit_tx WHERE chain = #{chain} AND block_number BETWEEN #{fromBlock} AND #{toBlock} ORDER BY block_number ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_wallet_deposit_tx ( id, user_id, chain, token, tx_hash, from_address, to_address, amount, block_number, confirmations, required_confirms, status, detected_at, confirmed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{chain}, #{token}, #{txHash}, #{fromAddress}, #{toAddress}, #{amount}, #{blockNumber}, #{confirmations}, #{requiredConfirmations}, #{statusCode}, #{detectedAt}, #{confirmedAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_wallet_deposit_tx SET user_id = #{userId}, token = #{token}, from_address = #{fromAddress}, to_address = #{toAddress}, amount = #{amount}, block_number = #{blockNumber}, confirmations = #{confirmations}, required_confirms = #{requiredConfirmations}, status = #{statusCode}, detected_at = #{detectedAt}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
